flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Columbia Gorge Community College rose 44% between 2017 and 2020 ($13.5k → $19.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Columbia Gorge Community College rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.8k → $5.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Columbia Gorge Community College rose 353% between 2006 and 2009 (5.0% → 22.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Columbia Gorge Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
